verses.text: Zedekiah in a uk a kum sawmlekhat kum, a kha thumna a ni masa ni-in Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a
“Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Egypt kumpipa Faro leh ama mite' kiangah hih bangin gen in: “Na lian mahmah uh a, kong tehpihtheih ding kuamah omlo hi
A hiangte hoihin pha mahmah a, a kung sang mahmahin meii lak a ban, Lebanon-a a po taamtak tawh na kibang uh hi
A khangsak ding tui om a, leisung panin an a pia ding tui om hi. Tua sing a pona mun tui kawt a, gamsung sing khempeuh in zong tui a ngah uh hi
Limtakin tui ngah ahih manin singkung dang khempeuh sangin a sangzaw hi. A hiangte golin sau mahmah hi
Vasa nam khempeuh in a hiang tungah bu tom uh a, ganhing nam khempeuh in a limnuai, tasuahna-in a nei uh hi. Leitung minam khempeuh in zong a limnuai belhin a nei uh hi
Tua singkung hoih mahmah a, a kung sangin, a hiang zau a, a zung in tui omna lei thukpi sung a ban hi

Pasian' huanah a om taamtak hoihte tawh tehtheih ding hilo a, taksing kung in tua bang hiang hoih nei ngeilo a, hiangpa kung in zong tua bang bang hiang hoih nei ngeilo hi. Pasian' huana singkungte zong tua zahin hoih ngeilo hi
A melhoihin ka bawl a, a hiang ka zausak hi. Pasian' huan sunga a po singkung khempeuhte' en'in ka bawl hi
“Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian keimah in hih bangin ka ci hi. Tua sing in meiipi a bat dongin khangto a, ahi zongin a san' semsemna tawh kizui-in kiphasak semsem hi
Tua ahih manin tua singkung ka deih nawn kei hi. Gamdang kumpi khat' khutsungah ka pia ding a, ama thuak dingin a kilawm bangin tua kumpipa in a bawl ding hi
Thukhualna a neilo gamdang mite in tua singkung phukin a nusiacip ding uh hi. Mual khempeuh leh guam khempeuhah a hiang kitante a kia ding uh hi. A lim a bel minam khempeuh in taisanta ding uh hi
Vasate hong leengin tua sing puk tungah tuang ding uh a, gamsate in a hiangte tuancil ding uh hi

Tua ahih ciangin tu-a kipanin singkung khat beek, bangzahin tui a ngah hangin tua zahin khangin, a dawn in meiipi banin sangzo ngei nawnlo ding hi. Misite' omna Leinuai khua a zuan ding, a si thei mihingte mah bangin singkung khempeuh a si ding ahi ta hi

“Topa Pasian in ka cihin-ah: Tua singkung in misite' khua Leinuai a zuat ciangin, leinuai-a tuite tuumsakin ka thuumsak ding hi. Guntuite leh luituite ka luangsak nawn kei ding a, Lebanon Mual maikhingin, gamlak sing khempeuh a keutum ding hi

Misite' omna Leinuai khua-ah tua singkung ka khiatsuk ciangin, a kiatna ging in minam khempeuh lokgawp ding hi. Tua singkung a kiat manin Eden singkung khempeuh, leh a hoihpen, limtakin tui a ngah Lebanon singkungte khempeuh in zong Leinuai-ah nuamtuam na sa ding uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh a sisate a zuan dingin misite' omna Leinuai-ah amah tawh a paikhawm ding uh hi. Ama limnuai a belte khempeuh, minam dangte' lakah kithehthang khin uh hi

“Tua singkung pen Egypt kumpipa Faro leh ama mite ahi hi. Eden huana singkungte nangawn tua zahin lianin hoih zolo hi. Ahi zongin, Eden huana singkungte mah bangin, Pasian' thu a ngaihsunlo, gasunga a site' omna a zuan dingin, misite' omna Leinuai a manawh ta ahi hi. Topa Pasian in hih thu ka gen khin hi,” hong ci hi.
